headline: Seagate (STX) Stock After 7x Rally Is The AI Storage Story Priced In?
summary: If you are wondering whether Seagate Technology Holdings is still reasonably priced after its strong run, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what the current valuation might be telling you. The stock most recently closed at US$1,070.23, with returns of 14.9% over 7 days, 32.1% over 30 days, 272.2% year to date, and well over 7x over the past year. This naturally raises questions about growth expectations and risk. Recent coverage has highlighted Seagate Technology Holdings...

headline: Jim Cramer Says Banks Like JPMorgan “Are Still Inexpensive”
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been.
